mapper.select: SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM space s JOIN member m ON s.host_id = m.member_id

SELECT s.space_no AS spaceNo, s.space_name AS spaceName, s.status, s.is_premium AS isPremium, TO_CHAR(s.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createdAt, s.category_no AS categoryNo, c.name AS categoryName, s.host_id AS hostId, m.login_id AS hostLoginId, hd.name AS hostName FROM space s JOIN member m ON s.host_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN host_detail hd ON m.member_id = hd.member_id LEFT JOIN category_space c ON s.category_no = c.category_no
ORDER BY s.space_no DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM space_premium p JOIN space s ON p.space_no = s.space_no
p.status = #{premiumStatus}
mapper.update: UPDATE space SET status = #{status}, admin_id = #{adminId}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE space_no = #{spaceNo}
UPDATE space_premium SET status = 'ACTIVE', admin_id = #{adminId}, applied_at = SYSDATE WHERE space_no = #{spaceNo} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE space_premium SET status = 'CANCELED', canceled_at = SYSDATE, admin_id = #{adminId} WHERE space_no = #{spaceNo} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO space_premium (premium_no, space_no, host_id, status, applied_at, admin_id) VALUES (SEQ_SPACE_PREMIUM.NEXTVAL, #{spaceNo}, #{hostId}, 'ACTIVE', SYSDATE, #{adminId})
mapper.select: SELECT s.space_no AS spaceNo, s.space_name AS spaceName, s.biz_reg_num AS bizRegNum, s.address, s.detail_addr AS detailAddr, s.region, s.bank_name AS bankName, s.account_no AS accountNo, s.account_holder AS accountHolder, s.status, s.is_premium AS isPremium, TO_CHAR(s.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, c.name AS categoryName, s.host_id AS hostId, m.login_id AS hostLoginId, hd.name AS hostName, hd.email AS hostEmail, hd.phone AS hostPhone FROM space s JOIN member m ON s.host_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN host_detail hd ON m.member_id = hd.member_id LEFT JOIN category_space c ON s.category_no = c.category_no WHERE s.space_no = #{spaceNo}
SELECT image_no AS unitNo, file_url AS imageUrl FROM space_image WHERE space_no = #{spaceNo} ORDER BY image_no ASC
SELECT unit_no AS unitNo, title AS unitTitle, price_per_hour AS unitPrice, max_capacity AS unitCapacity, description FROM space_unit WHERE space_no = #{spaceNo} ORDER BY unit_no ASC
